final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustrated infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, and CLI, designed for easy comprehension with a hand-drawn visual style.

Style/medium: hand-drawn infographic illustration with the approachable warmth of a sketched whiteboard explanation, combining simple line drawings with clear visual hierarchy
Composition: central concept map with AI at the core, radiating branches to connected terms, visual flow guiding the eye from definition boxes to relationship arrows
Subject: seven concept nodes (AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, CLI) each with brief definition text, relationship lines showing hierarchy and dependencies
Scene/backdrop: clean white/light background with subtle paper texture, generous breathing room between concept clusters
Lighting/mood: the soft clarity of a well-lit study session, inviting curiosity without overwhelm
Color palette: warm graphite and soft accent colors for concept categories, restrained palette to maintain readability
Materials/textures: pencil sketch lines with gentle ink accents, the honest texture of hand-drawn explanation
Text (verbatim): AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — all terms preserved in their original form
Constraints: all seven concepts must be visible, definitions must be legible, relationship arrows must clearly indicate connections, visual hierarchy must support quick comprehension
Avoid: overly decorative flourishes that obscure information, cramped layout, ambiguous relationship lines, photorealistic rendering
